---
title: "icon-extractor"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(rsicons)
icon("rstudio", height = 32)
icon("application-x-r-project", height = 32)
icon("newRMarkdownDoc", height = 32)
icon("executeCode", height = 32)
icon("insertChunk", height = 32)
icon("insertChunkR", height = 32)
icon("newSourceDoc", height = 32)
icon("stock_new", height = 32)
icon("knitDocument", height = 32)
icon("", height = 32)
```
